remarks: Elegance need not announce itself. Here, it simply feels at home. Quietly elegant and impeccably detailed, this Colonial pairs timeless architecture with interiors that feel as welcoming as they are sophisticated.  6170 SQ FT unfold across four finished levels, crafted for effortless entertaining and comfortable everyday living. A gracious living room with an oversized window seat and inviting fireplace sets the tone, while the soaring family room - anchored by a dramatic stone fireplace and walls of architectural window s- offers scale without sacrificing warmth. The Chef's kitchen w/ ultra-lux appliances flows seamlessly into gathering spaces, where memorable dinners and meaningful moments naturally unfold. Rich millwork, refined finishes and three fireplaces lend warmth and character throughout, while a handsome mahogany library provides a distinguished retreat. Five en suite bedrooms offer comfort, including three generously proportioned suites with sitting areas, walk-in closets and luxurious baths-each worthy of being the primary suite. The finished lower level offers exceptional flexibility with recreation, fitness and guest space. Outside, stone terraces, mature gardens and sweeping level lawns create a private setting for alfresco dining, relaxed gatherings or peaceful retreat. Set on 1.75 landscaped acres in one of Wilton's most sought-after estate neighborhoods, this is a home of enduring beauty, crafted to be enjoyed for generations.
